languages.original_text: "You pray for the people, Amic'Solomorne, even though you know the Undying One will come for them when needed. Such... sentimentality."

languages.text: "Ты молишься за людей, Амик'Соломон, хотя знаешь, что Неумирающий придет за ними в тот момент, когда это потребуется. Сколь... сентиментальное поведение".
languages.translation_comment: The characters came to medbay after the Rogue Trader allowed the use of augmentations on the bodies of commoners.

languages.text: "You pray for the people, Amic'Solomorne, even though you know the Undying One will come for them when needed. Such... sentimentality."
languages.original_text: "Ты молишься за людей, Амик'Соломон, хотя знаешь, что Неумирающий придет за ними в тот момент, когда это потребуется. Сколь... сентиментальное поведение".

traits.locale_text: "You pray for the people, Amic'Solomorne, even though you know the Undying One will come for them when needed. Such... sentimentality."
"You pray for the people, Amic'Solomorne, even though you know the Undying One will come for them when needed. Such... sentimentality."
"You pray for the people, Amic'Solomorne, even though you know the Undying One will come for them when needed. Such... sentimentality."

languages.text: 「あなたは、必要とされた時に不死の者たちが訪れることを知っていても、人々のために祈る。そんな…感情的な行為だ」
languages.original_text: "You pray for the people, Amic'Solomorne, even though you know the Undying One will come for them when needed. Such... sentimentality."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたたちは、必要とされた時に不死の者たちが訪れることを知っていても、人々のために祈る。そんな…感情的な行為だ」

languages.text: « Vous priez pour le peuple, Amic'Solomorne, tout en sachant que l'Immortel viendra au moment où ils en auront réellement besoin. Quelle... sensiblerie. »
languages.original_text: "You pray for the people, Amic'Solomorne, even though you know the Undying One will come for them when needed. Such... sentimentality."

traits.locale_text: « Vous priez pour le peuple, Amic'Solomorne, tout en sachant que l'Immortel viendra au moment où ils en auront réellement besoin. Quelle... sensiblerie. »

languages.text: "Ihr betet für die Leute, Amic'Solomorne, obwohl Ihr wisst, dass sie der Todlose holen wird, wenn es erforderlich ist. Das ist ausgesprochen ... sentimental."
languages.original_text: "You pray for the people, Amic'Solomorne, even though you know the Undying One will come for them when needed. Such... sentimentality."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr betet für die Leute, Amic'Solomorne, obwohl Ihr wisst, dass sie der Todlose holen wird, wenn es erforderlich ist. Das ist ausgesprochen ... sentimental."

languages.text: "İnsanlar için dua ediyorsun Amik'Solomorne, oysa Ölmeyen'in gerektiğinde onlar için geleceğini biliyorsun. Ne kadar... Duygusal."
languages.original_text: "You pray for the people, Amic'Solomorne, even though you know the Undying One will come for them when needed. Such... sentimentality."

traits.locale_text: "İnsanlar için dua ediyorsun Amik'Solomorne, oysa Ölmeyen'in gerektiğinde onlar için geleceğini biliyorsun. Ne kadar... Duygusal."

languages.text: «Rezas por la gente, Amic'Solomorne, aun cuando sabes bien que el Inmortal vendrá a por ellos cuando les llegue su hora. Qué... sentimental».
languages.original_text: "You pray for the people, Amic'Solomorne, even though you know the Undying One will come for them when needed. Such... sentimentality."

traits.locale_text: «Rezas por la gente, Amic'Solomorne, aun cuando sabes bien que el Inmortal vendrá a por ellos cuando les llegue su hora. Qué... sentimental».

languages.text: “信者索罗蒙，你明知不死之神会在必要时亲自带走他们，却仍在为他们祈祷。真是……心怀慈悲。”
languages.original_text: "You pray for the people, Amic'Solomorne, even though you know the Undying One will come for them when needed. Such... sentimentality."

traits.locale_text: “信者索罗蒙，你明知不死之神会在必要时亲自带走他们，却仍在为他们祈祷。真是……心怀慈悲。”
